name: Kimi K2.5 / K2 (1T)
description: ~1.06T total (32B activated); HF safetensors.total=1058.6B. K2.5 reuses the DeepSeek-V3 text arch (MLA + MoE) under a multimodal head. Numbers from text_config. MLA: kv_lora_rank=512, qk_rope_head_dim=64. MoE: n_routed_experts=384, first_k_dense_replace=1 -> 60 MoE layers.
